data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. ARCHIE MCIVOR had a tricky draw last time and although midfield in fifth wasn't far away finishing 2.5 lengths from the winner (19.59). Has a good record here at this journey. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings three times from five starts. Has ability and looks hard to stop. 3. AUSSIE MOSS was below best at his last couple, the latest finishing sixth at Horsham, but was among the placings at Ballarat three back. Has the ability and looks a key chance here. 1. POP'S BOY finished third last time (22.50) at Ballarat after winning at his previous two outings. Bold showing expected. 5. STRIKE IT MIKE has definite claims at his first try at this circuit.","runners":[2,3,1,5],"exclusive":false}
